creator: rch@writeme.com
text:
I have been runnig the same version of X and FreeBSD 3.2 and everything
worked on console and X. Now after reboot ( I don't change nothing ???)
mouse still works under console but when I start X and try to move
mouse I get SIGBUS. I can run X if I kill moused and use /dev/cuaa0 as mouseman mouse port.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Run XF86_S3 ?
